absence_reason: EMP-027 (Rahul Desai) — Casual leave. Material handling done by helper EMP-035.

machine_status.health_notes: Operating normally. Vibration slitting head: 2.1 mm/s. New coil batch loaded at 11:30 — good quality.
Running well. Speed 55 m/min. Motor current 165A (normal).
issues: UJ shaft #4 showing slight play — monitor next shift. Not critical yet.

machine_status.health_notes: Weld quality good. ECT signal: 25 mV (well within limits). RF power: 220 kW.
issues: Impeder replaced at 09:15 (cracked ferrite — normal wear). New one installed, took 20 min.

machine_status.health_notes: Furnace temperature stable at 895°C. All 6 coils balanced.
issues: Cooling bed roller #18 making slight noise. Bearing may need attention within 1-2 weeks.

machine_status.health_notes: Hydro test: 50 bar (Medium class). All tests passed. 3 pipes rejected for ovality.

alarms_events.alarm: Accumulator pit full (downstream stopped for 3 min)
alarms_events.resolution: FRM-201A had a brief roll adjustment stop. Resolved in 3 min.

alarms_events.alarm: Impeder temperature high (280°C)
alarms_events.resolution: Impeder cracked. Replaced with new ferrite rod. Back in production by 09:35.

alarms_events.alarm: Pyrometer #1 reading fluctuation (±20°C)

safety_observations: All personnel wearing correct PPE — verified at 08:00 round.
Fire extinguisher #Z4-02 pressure gauge showing yellow zone — reported to HSE for replacement.
Near-miss: Loose strapping band on floor near PKG-501A at 11:20. Cleaned immediately.
quality_issues: 3 pipes rejected at QC for ovality >2% (1.5% limit). Root cause: FRM-201A fin pass roll gap slightly off. Adjusted at 13:00.
pending_maintenance: FRM-201A UJ shaft #4 — monitor play, may need spider replacement next week.
HTR-401A cooling bed roller #18 — bearing noise, schedule replacement in next planned downtime.
instructions_for_next_shift: Continue with SP-ERW-50 production on Line A. 4 more coils in queue.
Watch FRM-201A UJ shaft #4 — report if vibration increases.
Fire extinguisher Z4-02 has been reported — do not rely on it until replaced.
Material handler absent today — helper Ajay is handling material with crane operator.

machine_status.health_notes: Normal operation. Vibration: 2.3 mm/s. Processed 4 coils from morning queue.
issues: Coil #CR-2026-1547 had edge crack — strip broke at 16:45. Re-threaded in 20 min. Remaining coil used at reduced tension (15 kN vs 20 kN).

machine_status.health_notes: Speed reduced to 45 m/min after UJ shaft #4 play increased (reported by morning shift). Vibration: 3.2 mm/s (monitoring).
issues: UJ shaft #4 play is worse than morning. Vibration now 3.2 mm/s (was 2.4 in morning). Recommend spider replacement ASAP.

machine_status.health_notes: Weld quality OK. ECT: 30 mV. Power: 225 kW.
issues: Noticed slight increase in weld bead height — scarfing tool may be wearing. Will measure tomorrow.
Cooling bed roller #18 noise louder than morning shift reported. Maintenance notified.

machine_status.health_notes: All hydro tests passed. 1 pipe rejected for wall thickness (3.5mm vs min 3.6mm required).

alarms_events.alarm: Strip tension zero — strip break detected
alarms_events.resolution: Edge crack in coil. Re-threaded. Continued at reduced tension.

alarms_events.alarm: Vibration warning — main drive 3.2 mm/s
alarms_events.resolution: Speed reduced to 45 m/min as precaution. Spider replacement needed.

safety_observations: EMP-036 (Mukesh) reminded to use ear plugs near forming mill.
Fire exit B path partially blocked by empty pallets for 13 minutes (19:10-19:23). Cleared by helper.
quality_issues: 1 pipe rejected for wall thickness variation. Material from coil #CR-2026-1547 (same coil with edge crack) — quarantined for review.
pending_maintenance: URGENT: FRM-201A UJ shaft #4 spider — replacement needed within 24 hrs. Speed reduced as interim.
HTR-401A cooling bed roller #18 — noise increasing. Schedule ASAP.
WLD-301A scarfing tool wear — measure and replace if >2.5mm.
instructions_for_next_shift: FRM-201A running at reduced speed (45 m/min) due to UJ #4 issue. DO NOT increase speed.
Coil #CR-2026-1547 quarantined in bay 3. Do not use.
Fire exit B was blocked briefly — ensure pallets are stored in designated area only.
Line B roll changeover 60% complete — mechanical team will continue tomorrow morning.

machine_status.health_notes: Normal. Vibration: 2.0 mm/s. Good coils processed tonight.
Running at 40 m/min (further reduced from 45). UJ #4 vibration: 3.8 mm/s. Getting worse.
issues: CRITICAL: UJ shaft #4 vibration 3.8 mm/s. Spider must be replaced first thing in morning shift. Reduced speed to 40 m/min at 02:00.
Production rate significantly affected due to speed reduction.

machine_status.health_notes: Weld OK. ECT: 28 mV. Scarfing tool measured at shift start: 2.2mm wear (limit: 3mm). Has some life left but should be replaced soon.

issues: Cooling bed roller #18 bearing making grinding sound now. EMP-023 applied grease but noise persists. Needs replacement.

machine_status.health_notes: All pipes tested OK this shift. No rejects.

alarms_events.alarm: Vibration warning — main drive UJ area 3.8 mm/s
alarms_events.resolution: Speed reduced to 40 m/min. Spider replacement scheduled for morning.

alarms_events.alarm: Cooling bed roller #18 — abnormal noise detected by operator
alarms_events.resolution: Grease applied but noise persists. Bearing replacement needed.

alarms_events.alarm: Power fluctuation — voltage dip on main bus (390V for 0.5 sec)
alarms_events.resolution: Grid fluctuation. UPS protected control systems. No machine trips.

safety_observations: Night safety round at 00:30 — all OK.
EMP-032 (Vivek) was not wearing face shield near furnace at 03:15 — reminded immediately. Wore shield after.
Emergency lighting tested during power dip — all working.
pending_maintenance: URGENT — CARRY OVER: FRM-201A UJ #4 spider replacement. Vibration 3.8 mm/s. Must be done today.
CARRY OVER: HTR-401A cooling bed roller #18 bearing. Grinding noise. Schedule today.
WLD-301A scarfing tool at 2.2mm wear. Replace before it reaches 3mm limit.
instructions_for_next_shift: FRM-201A at 40 m/min ONLY. UJ #4 vibration 3.8 mm/s. Maintenance manager EMP-003 informed. Spider replacement first priority.
HTR-401A roller #18 bearing needs replacement today.
WLD-301A scarfing tool wear at 2.2mm — keep spare ready.
Line B changeover still pending — check with maintenance for ETA.
Production behind target due to FRM-201A speed reduction — total today: 46.2 MT vs 60 MT target.

line_b.reason: Roll changeover completed. Trial run scheduled for B-shift.

machine_status.health_notes: UJ shaft #4 spider replaced by EMP-019 between 06:30-08:30 (2 hrs downtime). Post-repair vibration: 1.6 mm/s. Speed restored to 60 m/min.
issues: 2 hours downtime for UJ repair. But machine now running perfectly.

machine_status.health_notes: Scarfing tool replaced at 07:00 (preventive — wear was 2.2mm). New tool installed. Weld quality excellent.
Furnace OK. Cooling bed roller #18 bearing replaced by EMP-019 at 10:00 (1 hour downtime during production gap). Noise eliminated.
All tests passing. 2 pipes rejected for length (5.98m vs 6.0m minimum).

safety_observations: Fire extinguisher Z4-02 replaced by HSE team at 09:00.
Safety toolbox talk conducted at 06:15 — topic: Proper LOTO procedure.
quality_issues: 2 pipes short by 2cm — flying shear timing slightly off. Calibrated at 12:00.
pending_maintenance: Line B roll changeover complete. Trial run scheduled for B-shift today.
All urgent items from previous shifts resolved.
instructions_for_next_shift: FRM-201A repaired — UJ #4 replaced. Running at 60 m/min. All good.
HTR-401A roller #18 replaced. No more noise.
WLD-301A scarfing tool replaced.
Line B changeover done — please conduct trial run with test pipes.
Flying shear calibrated — verify first 10 pipe lengths.
